statements.impact_statement: Debian: intended behaviour, will not fix in any release.
kubectl v1.35 is present and compiled with vulnerable Go net/url.
statements.action_statement: kubectl v1.35 is compiled with vulnerable Go net/url; no patched stable release is available yet. Track and upgrade to the next patched kubectl stable release when available.

statements.impact_statement: vastai-sdk pins transformers<4.53; upgrade blocked by upstream dependency constraint.
statements.action_statement: Track upstream vastai-sdk for a release that relaxes the transformers<4.53 constraint, then upgrade transformers to a fixed version and update this VEX statement.

statements.impact_statement: vastai-sdk pins transformers<4.53; same upstream constraint as CVE-2025-6638.
statements.action_statement: Track upstream vastai-sdk for a release that relaxes the transformers<4.53 constraint, then upgrade transformers to a fixed version and update this VEX statement.
